meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Finish Projects Faster as a Freelancer
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on stalled projects. Learn how to leverage AI debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from technical debt and cognitive fatigue. By integrating AI-driven debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you offload the mental load of complex stack traces. Automating the identification and resolution of bugs allows you to maintain momentum, deliver projects ahead of schedule, and scale your freelance business.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is pinging, and you are staring at a terminal full of cryptic error messages that make zero sense. It’s the freelance developer’s worst nightmare: the 'almost finished' project that refuses to cross the finish line. You've spent hours chasing a ghost in the machine, and your confidence is eroding with every failed build.

But what if the bottleneck wasn't your skill, but your workflow? The most successful developers aren't the ones who write the cleanest code from memory; they are the ones who weaponize AI to crush bugs in real-time. By shifting from manual debugging to AI-assisted resolution, you transform your development process from a grueling slog into a high-velocity production line.

steps.title: Contextual Error Analysis
steps.description: Before diving into code, use AI to map the scope of the failure, ensuring you aren't fixing symptoms while ignoring the root cause.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and the provided stack trace. Identify if this error is a configuration mismatch, a dependency conflict, or a logic error in the main loop.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/main.ts --error 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property of undefined'

steps.title: Automated Dependency Auditing
steps.description: Most freelance 'stuck' points arise from incompatible package versions. Use AI to prune your lockfiles and resolve conflicts automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan package.json and lockfile for version mismatches. Propose a dependency update plan that ensures stability while fixing the current runtime crash.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm audit fix --force' and check for breaking changes

steps.title: Logic Refactoring with AI
steps.description: Once the crash is identified, refactor the specific module to be more resilient against edge cases that cause project stalling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication middleware to include robust error handling for null payloads. Use a pattern that avoids nested conditionals.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit ./src/middleware/auth.ts --instructions 'Implement early returns and add error logging'

steps.title: Integration Testing Generation
steps.description: Prevent future stalls by generating automated tests for the specific flow that was failing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test suite for the newly refactored module. Cover success scenarios and at least three edge-case failures.

steps.title: Deployment Verification
steps.description: Verify the fix in a staged environment before pushing to production to ensure the project is officially 'finished'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final changes and check for any remaining TODOs or hardcoded credentials that might block deployment.

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'package.json' or environment config first; it needs the map before it can find the path.
Use Claude Code to create a 'summary' of your session at the end of each day so you can pick up exactly where you left off tomorrow.
When debugging, ask the AI to 'explain the logic' rather than just 'fix the code' to ensure you retain the knowledge for future client work.
If a prompt fails, don't re-type it; ask the AI to 'analyze why the previous approach failed' to uncover hidden constraints.
Keep your AI context window clean by deleting irrelevant logs before starting a deep-dive debug session to maximize token efficiency.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current stalled project using the CLI commands above. Once the immediate bug is cleared, set a recurring 'AI-Audit' session for your next client project to prevent technical debt from accumulating in the first place.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your deadlines. By mastering these AI-driven workflows, you'll reclaim your time and finish every single project you start. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
